questions.q: Find current through the battery at the instant when switch S is closed
questions.solution: Initially all capacitors will act like conducting wire and all inductors will act like infinite resistance.

questions.subject: Physics
questions.examName: Most Important Selected Qs for JEE Advanced
questions.q: The charge on the capacitors $A$ and $B$ in steady state is :-
questions.solution:
In steady state :-
$V_P-V_Q=\frac{E}{2 R} \times R=\frac{E}{2}$
$V_Q-V_S=\frac{E}{2 R} \times R=\frac{E}{2}$
$\begin{aligned} & V_S=V_R \\ & V_P-V_R=E\end{aligned}$
$\begin{aligned} & \therefore Q_A=C E \\ & Q_B=\frac{C E}{2}\end{aligned}$
questions.source: Most Important Selected Qs for JEE Advanced

questions.subject: Physics
questions.examName: Most Important Selected Qs for JEE Advanced
questions.q: At a moment $(t=0)$, when the charge on capacitor $C_1$ is zero, the switch is closed. If $\mathrm{I}_0$ be the current through inductor at $t=0$, for $t\gt0$ (initially $\mathrm{C}_2$ is uncharged)
questions.solution: $\begin{aligned} & \frac{1}{2} \frac{q^2}{\left(C_1+C_2\right)}=\frac{1}{2} L I_0^2 \\ & q=\sqrt{L\left(C_1+C_2\right) I_0} \\ & q_1=\frac{q}{C_1+C_2} C_1=C_1 l_0 \sqrt{\frac{L}{\left(C_1+C_2\right)}}\end{aligned}$
questions.source: Most Important Selected Qs for JEE Advanced

questions.subject: Physics
questions.examName: Most Important Selected Qs for JEE Advanced
questions.q: A given LCR series circuit satisfies the condition for resonance with a given $A C$ source. If the angular frequency of the AC source is increased by $100 \%$, then in order to establish resonance, and without changing the value of inductance, capacitance must be
questions.solution:
At resonance, $\omega \mathrm{L}=\frac{1}{\omega \mathrm{C}}$, in second case for resonance, $2 \omega \mathrm{~L}=\frac{1}{2 \omega \mathrm{c}^{\prime}}$
$\therefore C^{\prime}=\frac{1}{4 \omega^2 L}=\frac{L C}{4 L}=\frac{C}{4}$
$\therefore \frac{\Delta \mathrm{C}}{\mathrm{C}}=\frac{3}{4}$
questions.source: Most Important Selected Qs for JEE Advanced

questions.subject: Physics
questions.examName: Most Important Selected Qs for JEE Advanced
questions.q: In the circuit shown in the figure, the switch $S$ was initially at position 1. After sufficiently long time, the switch $S$ was thrown from position 1 to position 2 at $t=t_0$. What will be the voltage drop across the resistor at that instant?
questions.solution: Initially there will be no potential drop across the capacitor but only across resistors.

questions.subject: Physics
questions.examName: Most Important Selected Qs for JEE Advanced
questions.q: Paragraph: A coil having a resistance of $50.0 \Omega$ and an inductance of 0.5 H is connected to an AC source of $110 \mathrm{~V}, 50$ Hz .Question: The impedance of the coil is (approximately)
questions.solution: The impedance is $z=\sqrt{R^2+\omega^2 L^2}$ and the rms current is $i_{\mathrm{ms}}=\frac{V_{\text {ms }}}{z}$.
questions.source: Most Important Selected Qs for JEE Advanced
